title: Section outline
description: Ordered array of section briefs that fan-out drafting will iterate over.

title.description: Working title for the post. Used for the H1 in final assembly.

summary.description: One-paragraph TL;DR of the whole post.

sections.description: Each section becomes one fan-out invocation in 03_draft_sections.

slug.description: Per-section folder name during fan-out. Must be filesystem-safe.

title.description: Verbatim H2 heading. Must appear in the final assembled draft.

focus.description: What this section must explain. Concrete, not 'discuss X'.

target_words.description: Soft target. Strict ceiling is enforced by word_count_under.
